heading: A Different Approach to Teaching
description: Our school does not group students by age, but by skill level. Divided into 5 levels, each child progresses at their own pace towards mastering reading, writing and arithmetic.

features.title: Enrichment Activities
features.description: Swimming, Music, Singing, Dance, Football, Creative Arts and more.

features.title: Life Skills
features.description: Preparation for CPE (PSAC) or vocational training depending on the student's profile.
